name: osac-ep-generator
description: OSAC enhancement proposal workflows: generate EPs from requirements and decompose into Jira epics with dependency mapping

skills.name: generate-ep
skills.description: Generate OSAC enhancement proposals from high-level requirements, meeting notes, or Jira tickets. Includes interactive clarification, codebase exploration, PR submission, and review feedback iteration.

skills.name: decompose-ep
skills.description: Decompose an approved OSAC enhancement proposal into a Jira epic with linked sub-tasks. Performs codebase-aware dependency mapping to identify cross-repo impacts and breaking changes.

commands.name: generate-ep
commands.description: Generate an OSAC enhancement proposal from requirements or meeting notes

commands.name: ep-to-jira
commands.description: Convert an approved EP into a Jira epic with sub-tasks

gh.description: GitHub CLI for PR creation and review fetching

jira.description: jira-cli (ankitpokhrel/jira-cli) for epic and task creation

jq.description: JSON processor for parsing CLI output
